content_of_post_to_comment:
So basically I have no project or anything happening in my life for which I would need motivation. However this is making me unmotivated to just do random stuff, make stuff up and do them - which leads to me doing nothing all day and ends in me being in a very depressed state, extremely tired of my life and needing a drastic change - which I can’t make happen.

Any advice would be appreciated
Thanks 🙏
comment: I’ve been in a similar spot where having no clear goal made even small things feel pointless. Sometimes waiting for motivation keeps you stuck because motivation often shows up after you start, not before. Try making tiny projects with a deadline just to create momentum, even if they seem silly. What kind of things did you used to enjoy doing before this slump?
